'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=XMLDltxNe_wKwDIAlJEhmuAnKe1eKv2DVr49Ua1WBC0-1770369437-1.0.1.1-kHOZbVSc0SxPc_9jqQSQYR5LMyFIkZ7iyHM5oNDIlaI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
